goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 promoted memory write request 队列

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 memory write request 队列
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-write-request.ts，把 promoted apply preflight 产生的 ready plan 转成 pending accepted-memory write request，并提供 dry-run preview、显式 --write 写入和 --list 只读列出入口。请求记录 proposed memory、required evidence、approval required、rollback plan 和 forbidden side effects；src/catty/README.md 同步说明该层位于 apply preflight 与未来真实 accepted-memory writer 之间。
summary.why: 前序切片已经有 promoted apply preflight 和 receipt-backed commit 协议，但未来真实 writer 还缺一个受控输入队列。这个队列让 Catty v0 可以继续靠 canary dogfood 推进 memory admission，同时保持 user memory 写入、catty_memory_audit、apply receipt 和 promoted status 的边界不会被 dry-run 或 promotion preview 越过。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 promoted memory write request 队列

decisions.chose: 把 pending request 放在 promoted apply preflight 之后、真实 accepted-memory writer 之前。
decisions.rationale: ready plan 已经证明 canary 可转正，但真实 user memory writer 仍是单独高风险边界；request 队列只定义 writer 输入，不执行写入。
rejected: 直接在 apply preflight 中调用真实 writer
绕过 request 队列让 receipt commit 自己生成 memory

decisions.rationale: 这样能持久化待处理 writer 请求，但不会污染用户长期 memory、catty_memory_audit、apply receipt 或 canary promoted 状态。
rejected: 把 canary status 更新为 promoted

decisions.chose: 默认 dry-run，显式 --write 才写 request 表，--list 缺表安全且不建表。
decisions.rationale: operator 可以先审查 pending request 形态；真实 writer 后续再消费 request 并返回 matching receipt。

decisions.chose: 把 preflight 报告的 proposed overlaps 视为同一 catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: runtime BDD、canary apply preflight、receipt-backed commit 等 intent 是本轮依赖，不是语义冲突；本轮只新增下一层 pending request。

rejected.alternative: 本轮实现真实 user memory writer
rejected.reason: 会越过 accepted-memory 写入边界，且当前目标只需要固定 writer 输入队列。
catty_memory_audit 是 memory admission 聚合/审计面，不适合承载 pending writer 输入、approval 和 rollback 计划。

rejected.alternative: 让 heartbeat 或 nightly runner 自动消费 request
rejected.reason: 本轮不能把模型或写 memory 行为接入高频运行态；消费策略需要单独设计和验证。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 本轮只写 pending request 队列，不写用户长期 memory。
request 来源是 promoted apply ready plan，不从 prediction/judgement 直接生成长期 memory。
新增 CLI 和函数不调模型、不接 heartbeat 或 nightly runner。
CLAUDE.md 是无关 dirty，未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty。
没有读取或输出 ~/.agents/memory/config.json、API key、cookie 或 secret。

review_notes: 验证：bun test src/catty/memory-canary*.test.ts，27 pass，210 expect。
验证：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，47 pass，322 expect。
CLI smoke：--help 输出 usage；--list 在 live DB 返回 requests=[]；默认 dry-run 在 live DB 返回 readyPlans=0、requests=0、blocked=0。
验证：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均通过。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok，full pipeline throttled 且上次 full pipeline ok。
提交 edc810f 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-write-request.ts、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-write-request.test.ts；未 push、未开 PR。
Mainline append 中有两条相同 turn；本 seal 摘要是该 intent 的权威收口。

subsystems: Catty v0 accepted memory write request queue
Catty v0 memory canary promoted apply preflight
Catty v0 anti-drift memory admission boundary
architectural_claims: Catty v0 now has an explicit pending request queue between promoted apply readiness and any future real accepted-memory writer.
A ready-to-promote canary still does not become user memory until a future writer consumes the request and returns a matching receipt to the existing apply commit protocol.
The request queue records operator approval, rollback and forbidden side effects as part of the writer input contract.
Actual user memory writing remains intentionally unimplemented.
behavioral_changes: previewAcceptedMemoryWriteRequests converts ready promoted apply plans into pending accepted-memory write requests without creating tables or mutating state.
writeAcceptedMemoryWriteRequests persists pending requests only in catty_accepted_memory_write_requests and leaves memory audit, apply receipts and canary status unchanged.
listAcceptedMemoryWriteRequests returns an empty list without creating Catty tables when the request table is missing.
CLI supports dry-run, --write and --list modes with --store-db override.

data_model_changes.name: catty_accepted_memory_write_requests
data_model_changes.location: SQLite DB selected by --store-db when writeAcceptedMemoryWriteRequests persists pending requests
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Created lazily only when --write has pending requests; dry-run and --list are missing-table safe and create nothing.

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, model provider env vars or user memory files are read or logged.
The new writer request API does not itself write user memory or call model providers.
Forbidden side effects are stored explicitly on each request so future writer integration has an auditable boundary.
migration_notes: No destructive migration is required; the new request table is additive and created lazily.
Existing canary, promotion decision, apply preflight and receipt commit behavior is preserved.
Future writer work should consume pending requests and then feed matching receipts to commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts.
